privacy.title: Thuruk (privacy) a ni
privacy.autoKeySyncHint: Room key thar a dawn chuan — i device zawng zawngah automatic-in a forward vek (E2E encrypted)
privacy.historySyncHint: Device zawng zawnga message awm zawng zawng encrypted copy. Server hian noise chauh a hmu thin
privacy.crossSignHint: Device tharte chu HMAC signature hmangin automatic-in verify (substitution laka invenna)
privacy.backupHint: Key zawng zawng chu passphrase hmangin encrypt la, server-ah save rawh. Device thlak chungchangah — phrase pakhat hmangin restore.
privacy.linkDeviceHint: Digit 6 code hmangin device thara key transfer tur. Key te hi ECIES hmanga encrypt a ni — server hian a chhiar thei lo.
privacy.ssssHint: Shamir-a scheme hmangin master key chu N part-ah then rawh. M part eng pawh hian key chu a rawn restore leh ang. Part tin hi rintlak contact (ECIES) bik atan encrypt a ni. Server hian encrypted blob chauh a hmu thin.
privacy.federatedHint: Federation node hrang hrangah encrypted backup shards sem darh (Shamir scheme). Server a bo pawhin — peers hmanga recovery.
privacy.ktHint: Hash chain (Merkle) hmanga public key thlak danglamna zawng zawng append-only log. Server chuan entry tin a sign vek — audit laiin forgery a awm tih hmuhchhuah a ni.

Ṭawng dangin library, callback leh boilerplate an mamawhna hmunah chuan Gravitix hian first-class event handler, conversation flows, leh built-in state a pe che a — chu zawng zawng chu Rust aṭanga inspired syntax thianghlim, chhiar awlsam takah a pe vek a ni.

error.p2: finally hi unconditionally-in a kal a — try-in a hlawhtlin emaw, catch-in error a handle emaw. Resources release nan emaw, log emaw, completion message thawn nan emaw hmang rawh.
error.p3: External input-a innghat operation-te tan error handling hmang rawh: user text parsing, API call, environment variable chhiar, emaw domain error (sqrt of negative, log of zero) awm theihna hmuna complex math tih te. Internal logic error atan chuan guard clause leh early returns te hi duh zawk ang che.

intro.h2: Hei hi tu tan nge ni?
intro.h3: He reference hi chhiar dan tur
intro.li1: Readable — code hi machinery angin ni lovin intent angin a chhiar thin
intro.li2: Safe — runtime hmaa static type catch tihsual awm thin
intro.li3: Expressive — flows, guards, leh pattern matching te hi built-in a ni
intro.li4: Minimal — class awm lo, rochan nei lo, zir tur framework awm lo
intro.p1: Gravitix hi domain-specific language (DSL) a ni a, a bul atanga Vortex bots ziah nan duan a ni. Ṭawng dangin library, callback leh boilerplate an mamawhna hmunah chuan Gravitix hian first-class event handlers, conversation flows, leh built-in state te a pe che a — chu zawng zawng chu Rust atanga inspired syntax thianghlim, chhiar awlsam takah a awm vek a ni.
intro.p2: Gravitix hi Vortex bot siam thuai duh tan a ni — code i ziak ngai lo emaw, seasoned developer Python boilerplate i chau tawh emaw pawh nise. He reference hian Gravitix hi principle hmasa ber a\angin a zirtir a: experience hmasa a ngai lo.
intro.p3: Section tin hian a hmaa awmte chu a siam chhuak vek a ni. Programming lama thar i nih chuan a chung atanga a hnuai thlengin chhiar thin ang che. Ṭawng dang i hriat tawh chuan, table of contents hmangin i ngaihven zawng chu direct-in zuang thla rawh.
intro.p4: He reference chhung zawng hian → tih awmzia chu "evaluates to" emaw "produces" emaw tihna a ni a, // ... hian compiler-in a ngaihthah comments a kawk a ni.

math_special.p1: Gamma function Γ(n) chu factorial-a generalization chhunzawm zel a ni: Γ(n) = (n−1)! positive integer te tan chuan. Factorial atanga real leh complex number thlengin a tizau a ni.
math_special.p2: Error function erf(x) = (2/√π)∫₀ˣ e^(−t2)dt chu Gaussian integral a ni. Normal CDF nen a inzawm tlat a, heat equation leh probability theory-ah a lang.
math_special.p3: ζ(s) = Σ 1/nˢ chu n=1,2,3,... (Re(s)>1 a nih chuan). Euler product hmangin prime distribution nen a inzawm. Riemann Hypothesis (unsolved!) hian complex plane-a ζ zero chungchang a sawi a.
math_special.p4: Bessel function Jₙ(x) leh Y3(x) te hi Bessel-a differential equation solution an ni a: x2y'' + xy' + (x2−n2)y = 0. Wave propagation, cylinder-a heat conduction, leh quantum mechanics-ah te an lang a ni.
math_special.p5: Ai(x) leh Bi(x) te hi y'' = xy solution a ni. Quantum tunneling (WKB approximation) leh optics (diffraction) ah te an lang thin.
math_special.p6: Heng polynomial chhungkua te hi operator pawimawh tak takte eigenfunction angin an lo piang a, spectral method, quadrature, leh quantum mechanics-ah te hman a ni.
math_special.p7: K(k) leh E(k) te hi elliptic integral kimchang tak, chi khatna leh chi hnihna an ni. Nonlinear pendulum period leh ellipse perimeter an chhut chhuak thin.
math_special.td1: A rilru a hah lutuk chuan a rilru a buai em em a. Γ(x) = ∫₀^∞ tˣ−1e⁻ᵗdt. Lanczos atanga chhut a ni. Γ(n+1)=n a ni!
math_special.td2: ln|Γ(x)|. Avoids overflow chu x lian tan chuan.
math_special.td3: A rilru a buai em em a, a rilru a hah em em bawk a. ψ(x) = d/dx ln Γ(x) = Γ’(x)/Γ(x) .
math_special.td5: P3(x): [−1,1]-ah orthogonal a ni. Hydrogen wavefunction hrang hranga angle part awm.
math_special.td6: H3(x): a sir lam hawia w.r.t. e^(−x2) tih a ni. Quantum harmonic oscillator hmanga siam a ni.
math_special.td7: T3(x) = cos(n·acos(x)): polynomial approximation tha ber.
math_special.td8: L3(x): [0,∞)-ah orthogonal a awm a, w.r.t. e^(−x) tih a ni. Hydrogen radial wavefunction hrang hrang a awm bawk.
